name: Lake Carlsbad Tennis And Racquetball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Carlsbad Tennis And Racquetball Complex in Carlsbad, NM! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Riverwalk Recreation Center
description: Riverwalk Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carlsbad, NM. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
